name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Image Loaded from Mock System Directory
notes:
This Building Block triggers when images (DLLs, EXEs, etc.) are loaded from a System32 directory that is not C:\Windows\System32.

Update the last rule filter to point to your default system directory if it is not C:Windows\System32.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Image Loaded from Mock System Directory on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Object Load Success
when the event matches File Directory (custom) matches any of expressions (?i)\\system32(\\|$)
when the event matches File Directory (custom) does not match any of expressions (?i)\w:\\windows\\system32(\\|$)
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Image Loaded from Mock System Directory on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Object Load Success
AND when the event matches File Directory (custom) matches any of expressions (?i)\\system32(\\|$)
AND when the event matches File Directory (custom) does not match any of expressions (?i)\w:\\windows\\system32(\\|$)
